description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with four jobs (python27, python35, python36, python37) all running in the default test stage. Use the python:2.7 Docker image for python27 and python:3.5, python:3.6, python:3.7 images for the other jobs. In each job set a before_script that exports PIP_PACKAGES (including mock and future for the py2 job) and sets PYTHON to the appropriate interpreter, then execute the shared script: export PYTHONVERSION=$(${PYTHON} -c "import platform ; print(platform.python_version()[:3])"); echo PYTHONVERSION=${PYTHONVERSION}; export INSTALL_DIR=${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/../tare_install; export SITE_PACKAGES_DIR=${INSTALL_DIR}/lib/python${PYTHONVERSION}/site-packages/; mkdir -p ${SITE_PACKAGES_DIR}; export PYTHONPATH="${SITE_PACKAGES_DIR}:${PYTHONPATH}"; ${PYTHON} -m pip install --upgrade pip; ${PYTHON} -m pip install ${PIP_PACKAGES} --user; ${PYTHON} setup.py build_sphinx; ${PYTHON} setup.py install --prefix=${INSTALL_DIR}; ${PYTHON} -m pytest -svv. Each job also defines a coverage pattern /TOTAL.+ ([0-9]{1,3}%)/ to capture test coverage.
